backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (GiftPack, Cart, Order, UserProfile, Coupon, etc.), storage maps for entities, and backend API functions for the gift pack e-commerce application with blob storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the CartSummary component fix for displaying item count and total price, with high confidence and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components and pages, describing routing, cart functionality, checkout flow, admin features, and UI components with their specific behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Razorpay checkout script integration and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes, AdminAuthProvider, ThemeProvider, automatic data initialization, and login/logout handlers that sync or clear cart state.
frontend/src/components/admin/CategoryFo: Reusable form component for creating or editing categories with name and description fields, validation, loading states, and cancel functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/CategoryLi: Displays list of categories with loading skeletons, empty state, and edit buttons for each category card.
frontend/src/components/admin/CategoryMa: Admin category management container combining CategoryForm and CategoryList, handling create/update mutations with toast notifications and edit state management.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponForm: React form component for creating and editing coupons with validation for code, discount percentage, min/max discount amounts, expiration date, and total quantity. Uses react-hook-form and supports both create and edit modes.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponList: Displays a grid of coupon cards showing code, discount percentage, quantity remaining, expiration date, and status badges (Active/Expired/Sold Out). Includes edit button for each coupon and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: Parent component that orchestrates coupon creation, editing, and listing by combining CouponForm and CouponList components. Handles form submission, state management for editing mode, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/GiftPackFo: React form component for creating and editing gift packs with fields for ID, title, description, price, discount, category, images (with dynamic array), basket type, and size. Uses react-hook-form with field arrays for multiple images.
frontend/src/components/admin/GiftPackLi: Displays a grid of gift pack cards with images, title, description, category/basket/size badges, pricing, and action buttons for edit/delete. Includes loading skeletons, error handling, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/GiftPackMa: Parent component that manages gift pack CRUD operations by combining GiftPackForm and GiftPackList components. Handles create, update, delete actions and editing state management.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: Modal component displaying detailed order information including status, payment, items, delivery address, and gift message. Allows admin to update order status via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderFilte: Filter component for orders with search by order ID/customer name, status dropdown, and date range picker. Includes clear filters button and emits filter state changes to parent.
Displays a list of orders as clickable cards showing order ID, date, customer, item count, total, status, and payment badges. Opens OrderDetailModal on click.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Main order management container that combines OrderFilters and OrderList, applying client-side filtering by search term, status, and date range to the orders fetched from useAllOrders hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentDet: Modal displaying payment transaction details including status, amount, payment method, transaction ID, payer principal, and associated order information if available.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentFil: Filter component for payments with search by transaction ID, status dropdown (success/pending/failed), and date range picker. Includes clear filters functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentLis: Displays a grid of payment cards with status badges, transaction details, and amount information. Clicking a card opens a PaymentDetailModal with full payment information.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentMan: Main payment management component that fetches payments via usePaymentManagement hook and provides filtering by search term, status, and date range. Renders PaymentFilters and PaymentList components.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Form component for creating and editing products with fields for ID, name, description, price, category, and multiple image URLs. Uses react-hook-form with validation and supports both create and update modes.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductLis: Displays a grid of product cards fetched via useCustomProducts hook, showing product images, details, price, and action buttons for editing and deleting. Handles loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductMan: Orchestrates product CRUD operations using useProductMutation hook, managing form visibility and edit state. Provides create, update, and delete functionality with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProtectedAd: Route guard component that checks admin authentication status via useAdminAuth hook and redirects to login if not authenticated. Shows loading spinner during authentication check.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, pricing (including discount calculation), quantity controls, and remove button. Displays optional custom message and wrapping options.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Displays cart summary with item count, subtotal, GST, and total price, with a button to proceed to checkout. Shows loading skeleton while gift pack data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Address: Form component for entering delivery address with real-time pincode serviceability validation. Pre-fills fields from user profile and validates phone and pincode before submission.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderSu: Displays order summary at checkout showing selected items, subtotal, coupon discount (if applied), GST, and total price. Shows loading skeleton while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/customization/Ba: Grid of selectable basket type cards (wicker basket, wooden crate, gift box) with icons and descriptions. Highlights selected type with ring styling.
frontend/src/components/customization/It: Grid of selectable gift items with a maximum selection limit, showing mock items with prices and categories. Displays selection count and disables items when limit is reached.
frontend/src/components/customization/Me: Text area form for adding an optional personalized message to the gift, with a 200-character limit and remaining character counter.
frontend/src/components/customization/Pa: Grid of selectable packing style cards (classic wrap, premium wrap, gold ribbon, silver ribbon) with color-coded icons and descriptions. Highlights selected type with ring styling.
Sticky sidebar preview showing the custom pack configuration including basket type, size, selected items with remove buttons, packing style, message card, and total price calculation.
frontend/src/components/customization/Pe: File appears to be empty or truncated in the provided content.
frontend/src/components/customization/Si: Displays a grid of selectable gift basket size cards (Small, Medium, Large) with capacity, description, and pricing information. Highlights the selected size with a terracotta ring border.
frontend/src/components/customization/St: Renders a horizontal progress indicator showing 5 customization steps (Basket Type, Size, Products, Packing, Message). Displays completed steps with checkmarks, current step highlighted, and connecting lines between steps.
Provides Back and Next navigation buttons for multi-step customization flow. Disables Back on first step and Next when canProceed is false.
frontend/src/components/delivery/Pincode: Card component that validates and checks pincode serviceability via backend actor. Shows loading state during check and displays success/error messages with appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with four columns containing brand info, quick links, delivery information, and social media icons. Includes copyright notice and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky header with logo, navigation menu, pincode checker popover, cart icon with item count, and user authentication controls. Includes mobile menu sheet and conditional admin link for authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, main content area (Outlet), and Footer in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/product/FilterSi: Filtering UI for catalog with category checkboxes and price range slider. Renders as a card on desktop and a sheet drawer on mobile, with clear all functionality.
frontend/src/components/product/GiftPack: Displays a gift pack card with image carousel, discount badge, pricing, and add-to-cart functionality. Navigates to gift pack detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/product/ProductG: Renders a grid of GiftPackCard components with add-to-cart handling and toast notifications. Shows empty state when no gift packs are available.
frontend/src/components/profile/OrderHis: Displays individual order details with expandable item list, status badges, payment status, and formatted date/amount. Supports multiple order and payment statuses.
Fetches and displays user order history sorted by date with loading and error states. Shows empty state when no orders exist.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.tsx: Provides admin authentication context with hardcoded credentials (admin/admin), session persistence in localStorage, and login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Manages shopping cart state with localStorage persistence, backend synchronization when authenticated, and operations for adding, updating, removing items and applying coupons.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategories.ts: React Query hook that fetches all categories from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryMutation.t: Provides mutations for creating and updating categories with query cache invalidation. Update functionality is a placeholder pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact form data (name, email, phone, message) to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoupon.ts: Provides coupon validation mutation and discount calculation utility. Validates coupon codes via backend and computes percentage-based discounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useCouponMutation.ts: Provides React Query mutations for creating and updating coupons, plus a query hook for fetching all coupons (currently returns empty array as backend method is not yet implemented).
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomProducts.ts: Exports a React Query hook to fetch all custom products from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGiftPackMutation.t: Provides React Query mutations for creating, updating, and deleting gift packs with toast notifications and query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGiftPacks.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching all gift packs, filtered gift packs (with search and category filters), and individual gift packs by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider with login, logout, and identity management using @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrder.ts: Provides a React Query mutation hook for creating orders with cart items, delivery details, and payment information.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrderHistory.ts: Exports a React Query hook to fetch the order history for the current user.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrderManagement.ts: Provides admin hooks for fetching all orders (sorted by creation date) and updating order status with toast notifications.
Exports a React Query hook to fetch and sort all Razorpay payments by payment ID in descending order.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductMutation.ts: Provides React Query mutations for creating, updating, and deleting custom products (delete not yet implemented in backend).
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a mutation hook to initialize backend data and invalidate gift pack queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useRazorpay.ts: Custom hook for initiating Razorpay payment flows with order details, handling success/failure callbacks and payment processing state.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and updating the current user's profile including name, email, phone, address, and pincode.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette (terracotta, sage green, cream) using CSS variables in OKLCH color space, including light and dark mode themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with form validation using react-hook-form, handles authentication via useAdminAuth hook and redirects to admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying management sections for orders, payments, products, categories, coupons, and gift packs with logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page showing cart items with quantity controls, custom messages, wrapping options, and cart summary with checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Gift pack catalog page with search functionality, filter sidebar, and product grid displaying filtered results with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page handling user authentication, delivery address form, coupon validation and application, order summary, and Razorpay payment integration.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact form page with validation for name, email, phone, and message fields. Uses react-hook-form and displays success/error alerts after submission via useContactForm hook.
frontend/src/pages/CustomPackPage.tsx: Multi-step custom gift pack builder with 5 steps: basket type, size, product selection, packing type, and optional message card. Validates each step and adds the custom pack to cart upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/GiftPackDetailPage.ts: Gift pack detail page displaying product images (with carousel for multiple images), description, pricing with discounts, and add-to-cart functionality. Handles loading states and missing products.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, feature highlights (curated collections, customization, delivery), and featured gift packs grid. Includes navigation to catalog and custom pack builder.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page displaying order ID, estimated delivery date (5-7 business days), and payment status with payment ID retrieved from sessionStorage. Provides navigation back to home or order tracking.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page component with form for managing personal details, delivery address, and order history. Includes pincode serviceability validation and integration with Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/types/razorpay.d.ts: TypeScript type definitions for Razorpay payment gateway integration, including options, response types, and global window interface extension.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Validation utility functions for pincode (6 digits) and phone number (10 digits) formats, with delivery availability check placeholder.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette (terracotta, sage, cream), typography settings, animations, and design system tokens using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking cart summary display bug fix, with pending feature requests to verify useCart hook and CartItemRow component data flow.
